title: Deliciously Crispy Greek Lamb Kebabs
description: A flavorful and adventurous Greek dish featuring lamb, almond flour, and a rich deglaze, perfect for a weeknight dinner or special occasion.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
In a shallow dish, mix together the almond flour, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, salt, and black pepper.
Coat the lamb skewers in the almond flour mixture, pressing gently to adhere.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are nicely browned and cooked through.
Remove the skewers from the grill and place them on a plate.
Deglaze the grill with the red wine, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the grill.
Brush the deglaze over the lamb skewers and serve immediately.
